mapper.select: select user_id as id, username, password, name, role, email, register_time as registerTime from user where user_id = #{id}
select user_id AS id, username, name, password, email, role, register_time AS registerTime from user where username = #{username}
mapper.insert: insert INTO user(username, `name`, password, email, role, register_time) values (#{username}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, 'USER', NOW())
mapper.update: update user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, role = #{role}, email = #{email}, register_time = #{registerTime} where user_id = #{id}
